cases.prompt: Claude Code on the web 쓰는데 매 세션마다 의존성 설치되게 SessionStart hook 만들어줘.

assertions.text: Uses a marker-based short-circuit so repeat runs skip already-done install
Bootstrap is environment-aware (handles both web and local execution)

cases.prompt: Set up a startup hook so tests and linters work on every cloud session.

assertions.text: Installs dependencies so tests/linters run in remote Claude Code sessions
Wires the SessionStart hook event consuming the stdin JSON (source/cwd)
